narrative:
Jackson Township has 35,931 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 9.0 percentage points.
